arts.ttl: Rodri, De Bruyne, Ake - Man City injury news and return dates before Watford
arts.sum: Manchester City injury news as Pep Guardiola suffers two concerning injury blows in the aftermath of Sunday's 2-2 draw with Arsenal

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's angry reaction against Arsenal can't hide obvious Man City problems
arts.sum: Manchester City manager was seen kicking a seat during his team's Premier League draw against Arsenal on a tough afternoon for the champions at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker's foul-mouthed response sums up Man City woes after Arsenal howler
arts.sum: MAN CITY 2-2 ARSENAL: Premier League champions Man City just about earned a point in their clash with the Gunners at the Etihad Stadium but one star in particular appears to be struggling

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola issues Rodri injury update after Man City's thriller with Arsenal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is unsure of the severity of the injury that Rodri suffered in Manchester City's pulsating 2-2 draw with Arsenal in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: 'Liverpool won something, Arsenal didn't' - Bernardo Silva launches extraordinary attack on rivals
arts.sum: Bernardo Silva has criticised Arsenal's record and their style of play in an extraordinary rant after Manchester City were held to a 2-2 draw in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland incident that triggered furious bust-up between Man City and Arsenal stars
arts.sum: Manchester City denied title rivals Arsenal on Sunday afternoon through John Stones' late equaliser and striker Erling Haaland caused a bit of mischief in his side's celebrations following the goal

arts.ttl: ‘No overlaps, no underlaps’: Roy Keane tears into Manchester City after draw against Arsenal
arts.sum: Roy Keane criticised Manchester City for their struggles to break down 10-man Arsenal

arts.ttl: Man City score stoppage-time equaliser to deny 10-man Arsenal in Etihad thriller
arts.sum: John Stones struck late on after the Gunners had played the whole second half with a man less.

arts.ttl: Haaland becomes 19th man to 100 City goals
arts.sum: He scored 52 goals in his first season at the Etihad Stadium – more than any Premier League player has ever managed in a single term and the most ever by a City player in our long history. Erling Haaland has become the 19th player to score 100 goals for Manchester City, requiring just 105 matches to hit the landmark.
